% ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
%  Part A §1  — Fundamental Constants
% ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

\begin{equation}
  \frac{\sqrt{2}}{2}

\end{equation}

\begin{equation}
  2 \eta^{2} = 1
  \label{eq:eta-norm-sympy}
\end{equation}

\begin{equation}
  \delta_{S} \left(-1 + \sqrt{2}\right) = 1
  \label{eq:silver-prod-sympy}
\end{equation}

\begin{equation}
  \delta_{S}^{2} = 2 \delta_{S} + 1
  \label{eq:silver-sq-sympy}
\end{equation}

\begin{equation}
  \frac{1}{\delta_{S}} = -1 + \sqrt{2}
  \label{eq:silver-inv-sympy}
\end{equation}

%  Part A §2  — Critical Eigenvalue μ = e^{i3π/4}

\begin{equation}
  \mu = - \frac{\sqrt{2}}{2} + \frac{\sqrt{2} i}{2}
  \label{eq:mu-sympy}
\end{equation}

\begin{equation}
  \left|{\mu}\right| = 1
  \label{eq:mu-norm-sympy}
\end{equation}

\begin{equation}
  \arg{\left(\mu \right)} = \frac{3 \pi}{4}
  \label{eq:mu-arg-sympy}
\end{equation}

\begin{equation}
  \mu^{8} = 1
  \label{eq:mu-8-sympy}
\end{equation}

\begin{equation}
  \left\{-1, 1, - i, i, e^{- \frac{3 i \pi}{4}}, e^{- \frac{i \pi}{4}}, e^{\frac{i \pi}{4}}, e^{\frac{3 i \pi}{4}}\right\}

\end{equation}

  \operatorname{sech}{\left(\lambda \right)} = \frac{1}{\cosh{\left(\lambda \right)}}

\begin{equation}
  \cosh{\left(\lambda \right)} \operatorname{sech}{\left(\lambda \right)} = 1

\begin{equation}
  R_{eff} = \cosh{\left(\lambda \right)}

  G_{tot} = N \operatorname{sech}{\left(\lambda \right)}

  R_{tot} = \frac{\cosh{\left(\lambda \right)}}{N}

\end{equation}

\begin{equation}
